title: RBI (Commercial Banks — Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)- Seventh Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI mandates separate disclosure of provisions and detailed credit quality reporting. The ruling improves transparency and aligns financial statements with updated provisioning norms.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks — Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures)- Seventh Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
